g.text: Hedging Detection - Association Detection Logic (3 Criteria + Agent Check)

Get association result:
[{CustID: 1001, GroupID: 1},
 {CustID: 1002, GroupID: 1},
 {CustID: 1003, GroupID: 2},
 {CustID: 1004, GroupID: 0}]; -- Unassigned
Parse CustGroup JSON into Temp_CustGroup table
Has valid groups with IsHedging = TRUE?
Call Process SP again with new CustGroup
Some customers may not be detected
in Round 1 due to timing or partial data.
Group by TransIDList to avoid duplicates
Filter only groups with IsHedging = TRUE
- Only PA categories have this flag
